title: Advancify
description: Advancify is a Minecraft mod currently only for forge which adds many new advancements to Minecraft!
body:
Advancify Is a Minecraft mod currently only available for forge that adds many new advancements to Minecraft!
____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

NOT A PRODUCT OF MOJANG

CURRENTLY AVAILABLE ON FORGE FOR 1.20.1
____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

New Advancements:

Welcome To The Dark Side - Obtain a block of netherite

Sugar Rush - Obtain a cookie

The Return Of The Pigs - Obtain a piglin head

I'm Out Of Here - Leave the Nether

Ouch That's A Splinter! - Obtain an oak log

Welcome To Minecraft - Join the game

Advancify Mod - Join the game

I Might Be Sick - Eat rotten flesh

Make It Faster - Obtain a minecart

Worst Mob Ever - Obtain phantom membrane

It's A Raw Iron Block - Obtain a raw iron block (based on the "it's corn" meme)

Boat-A-Fide Explorer - Obtain a boat

Left Or Right? - Craft a stone axe (left is obviously right)
